_meta.description: Human-auditable health overlay for the model slots in models/MODEL_REGISTRY.json.
_meta.rule: This file describes slot readiness only. It does not contain weights or generated artifacts.

M02_embedder.action: Repair M02 before retiring the safe MiniLM fallback copy.

M03_contradiction.issue: Zero-byte metadata files reported in NAS audits.
M03_contradiction.action: Repair M03 before retiring the safe DeBERTa NLI fallback copy.

M11_math_verify.issue: Slot folder exists on NAS, but no weights are assigned yet.
M11_math_verify.action: Treat as unavailable until an approval packet assigns weights.

M12_paper_review.issue: Slot folder exists on NAS, but no weights are assigned yet.
M12_paper_review.action: Treat as unavailable until an approval packet assigns weights.

P02_recbole.issue: Preference slot is reserved but not wired.
P02_recbole.action: Do not route live BIL decisions here until wiring is approved.

P03_lightfm.issue: Preference slot is reserved but not wired.
P03_lightfm.action: Do not route live BIL decisions here until wiring is approved.

P04_paper_recommender.issue: Slot folder is empty; working implementation lives as a station mirror on NAS.
P04_paper_recommender.action: Use the paper-recommender station; do not infer model weights exist.
